source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 2 - Air-to-Ground Weapons > 2.4 - M61A2 Gun (Air-to-Ground)

steps.voiced: Set Master Arm switch to ARM.

steps.action: Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page
Select Gun Rounds Options (MK-50 or PGU-28 rounds)
steps.voiced: Select desired gun rounds — MK-50 or PGU-28.

steps.action: Set Gun Firing Rate Option (HI = 6000 rounds per minute, LO = 4000 rounds per minute)
steps.voiced: Set gun firing rate — HI for 6000 rpm, LO for 4000 rpm.

steps.action: Set Gun Mode to CCIP (text should be boxed) Gun Reticle Pipper CCIP Mode Selected Gun Selected & Armed Gun Rounds Remaining
steps.voiced: Set Gun Mode to CCIP — confirm it boxes.

steps.action: Set center of gun reticle on target and wait for the « IN RNG » (In Range) cue to appear.
steps.voiced: Place gun reticle on target and wait for the IN RNG cue.
Squeeze the gun trigger to fire.

steps.action: Once you have done your run and the Breakaway X appears, break off the attack and wave off from target. In Range Cue Breakaway X
steps.voiced: When Breakaway X appears, break off the attack.
